ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_assets" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media asset */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the media asset (UID) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media asset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media asset was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Array of permission strings for the media asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the media asset */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director(s) of the media asset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the media asset was released */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the media asset */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the media asset is active */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Array of genres associated with the media asset */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of media asset (e.g., movie, TV show, short film) */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status of the media asset (e.g., in production, post-production, released) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the media asset */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the media asset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the media asset */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language(s) of the media asset */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Content rating (e.g., PG, R) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content creator, producer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is assigned */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset to which the permission applies */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has read access */,
  "create_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has create access */,
  "update_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has update access */,
  "delete_permission" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has delete access */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission expires */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., global, specific asset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_genres" (
  "media_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media-genre association */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_genres_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_directors" (
  "media_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media-director association */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_directors_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the media asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media asset the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., technical, content) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_assets ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
